name: OpenCode Bridge
description: Route @cc/@ccn/@ccu prefix messages to OpenCode CLI, suppressing the default LLM response.

scriptsDir.description: Path to bridge shell scripts directory

scriptsDir.label: Scripts Directory
scriptsDir.help: Absolute path to the directory containing opencode-send.sh, opencode-new-session.sh, opencode-stats.sh

targetId.label: Target ID
targetId.help: Target ID for sending replies (e.g. Telegram chat ID)
